title: IPTF Pattern Frontmatter (v2)
description: Schema for pattern document frontmatter in IPTF Map. v2 adds structured context_differentiation, crops_context, post_quantum, related_patterns, open_source_implementations, and meta-pattern support. Backward-compatible: v1 fields (dependencies, old maturity values) still validate until the strict-mode flip.

maturity.description: Technology maturity. v2 values: research | concept | testnet | production. v1 values (experimental, PoC, pilot, prod) are accepted during migration and will be removed in the strict-mode flip.

type.description: Pattern kind. 'meta' patterns aggregate sub_patterns and may omit crops_profile, Protocol, and Example. Defaults to 'standard' when absent.

privacy_goal.description: DEPRECATED (v1). Not carried into v2 — the Intent paragraph covers this. Accepted during migration.

assumptions.description: DEPRECATED (v1). Not carried into v2 — assumptions belong in body/Components. Accepted during migration.

last_reviewed.description: Last review date in YYYY-MM-DD format

works-best-when.description: Conditions when this pattern is optimal

avoid-when.description: Conditions when to avoid this pattern

dependencies.description: DEPRECATED (v1). Use `standards` and `related_patterns` in v2. Accepted during migration.

standards.description: Standards this pattern relies on (ERC-20, EIP-7573, etc.). Top-level replacement for v1 ingredients.standards.

related_patterns.description: Cross-references to other patterns. Slugs match pattern-<slug>.md. Replaces v1 `dependencies` for pattern refs.

requires.description: Hard dependencies — can't implement this without them

alternative_to.description: Competing approach to the same problem

open_source_implementations.description: Known open-source implementations. Plural, neutral — multiple entries allowed.

sub_patterns.description: Children of a meta-pattern. Required when type: meta.

crops_summary.description: One-line CROPS trade-off summary for this child

context_differentiation.description: How the pattern applies differently in I2I vs I2U. Required when context: both (enforced by validator).

i2i.description: How this plays out between institutions

i2u.description: How this plays out for user-facing deployments; what extra protections are needed

crops_profile.description: CROPS dimension assessment. Use the string 'n/a' for meta/evaluation patterns that do not implement privacy directly.

o.description: Openness: source availability, open standards, exit paths, forkability. The 'O' in CROPS — broader than just open source.

os.description: DEPRECATED (v1). Renamed to 'o' in v2 to match the CROPS acronym. 'O' stands for Openness, not Open Source. Accepted during migration.

p.description: Privacy: full (private from everyone), partial (selective disclosure required), none (public or institution sees all)

privacy.description: DEPRECATED (v1). Renamed to 'p' in v2 to match the CROPS acronym. Accepted during migration.

s.description: Security: strength of guarantees (cryptographic assumptions, decentralization, trust model)

security.description: DEPRECATED (v1). Renamed to 's' in v2 to match the CROPS acronym. Accepted during migration.

crops_context.description: Narrative context for each CROPS dimension — where the badges drift up or down in practice. Replaces the ad-hoc 'CROPS context' bullet in Trade-offs. v2 uses single-letter keys (cr, o, p, s) to match crops_profile.

visibility.description: Optional four-slot visibility matrix for transaction-level patterns: who sees what. Skip for infrastructure or primitive patterns where the model does not apply.

post_quantum.description: Post-quantum exposure summary. Replaces the ad-hoc 'Post-quantum' bullet in Trade-offs.
